title: Codex Empty-Turn Log Entry
description: One JSONL line per empty-turn classification. Written by empty-turn-log.ts to <state>/codex/empty-turns.jsonl, mirrored to bus channel codex.emptyTurn.

schemaVersion.description: Bump on any breaking change to this schema. Current: 1.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the classifier emitted this entry.

logSequence.description: Monotonic counter scoped to provider process lifetime. Mirrors the value attached to providerMetadata.openai.emptyTurnClassification.logSequence so forensic readers can join.

messageId.description: opencode message id of the assistant turn that landed empty.

accountId.description: Codex account id assigned for this turn (may be null if the turn collapsed before account binding completed).

modelId.description: Model id sent in the request body (e.g., 'gpt-5.5', 'gpt-5.3-codex').

causeFamily.description: Which cause family the classifier matched. Append-only enum; never remove or rename a value (per spec Requirement 'Cause-family enum is finite and append-only').

recoveryAction.description: Which recovery action the classifier selected. 'hard-error' is excluded by Decision D-1.

wsFrameCount.description: Total WS frames received from codex before stream termination. Distinguishes ws_no_frames (==0) from ws_truncation (>0).

terminalEventReceived.description: True iff one of {response.completed, response.incomplete, response.failed, error} was parsed during the stream.

terminalEventType.description: If terminalEventReceived is true, which event type. null otherwise.

wsCloseCode.description: WS close code from ws.onclose, when available. null if event was onerror.

wsCloseReason.description: WS close reason string from ws.onclose, when available. Truncated to 256 chars.

serverErrorMessage.description: When causeFamily is server_failed or server_incomplete, the verbatim server message (truncated to 1024 chars). null otherwise.

text.description: Count of response.output_text.delta events received during the stream.

deltasObserved.description: Counts by event type. 'Empty turn' means text and toolCallArguments are both 0.

store.description: Value of body.store sent in this request.

reasoningEffortValue.description: Verbatim value of body.reasoning.effort, or null if unset.

includeFields.description: Verbatim list of body.include strings (e.g., ['reasoning.encrypted_content']). Empty array if unset.

toolCount.description: Number of tool definitions in body.tools.

promptCacheKeyHash.description: SHA-256 hash (hex, first 16 chars) of body.prompt_cache_key. Sanitization: full key may contain account-derived bytes; we hash to enable correlation without leaking.

inputItemCount.description: Number of items in body.input array.

instructionsByteSize.description: Byte size of body.instructions string. Helps identify oversize-prompt patterns.

suspectParams.description: Subset of request parameters the classifier flagged as suspect for this cause family. Drives D-3 audit-before-omit decision: when a cause cluster correlates with specific suspectParams, that's the signal to extend the spec.

requestOptionsShape.description: Sanitized shape of the request body. NOT the full body — only fields relevant to classification + audit. PII / token / full prompt content is NEVER logged.

finishReasonAtFlush.description: Value of state.finishReason when the classifier was invoked. null if no terminal event arrived.

openTextId.description: Value of state.openTextId when classifier ran (indicates a text part was started but never closed).

responseId.description: Codex response id when classifier ran. null if no response.created/in_progress event arrived.

usage.description: Verbatim state.usage when classifier ran. All-null indicates no usage event ever arrived.

streamStateSnapshot.description: Snapshot of internal SSE state at the moment of classification. Sufficient to forensically reconstruct what the parser saw.

retryAttempted.description: True iff this entry represents a turn where retry-once-then-soft-fail dispatched a retry. The retry's own attempt produces a separate log entry with retryAttempted=true.

retryAlsoEmpty.description: If retryAttempted is true, whether the retry also landed empty. null if retryAttempted is false.

previousLogSequence.description: If this entry is the second attempt of a retry pair, the logSequence of the first attempt. Enables joining retry pairs in log analysis.
